teacher.builder.form.systemPromptPlaceho: Write the complete system prompt the AI tutor will follow. No scenario, target expressions, grammar, or language-mix scaffolding will be added.
teacher.builder.form.systemPromptHint: Analytics that depend on target expressions, grammar, or rubric dimensions will show N/A for this assignment.
teacher.builder.form.instructionsPlaceho: Teacher instructions, pasted source packet, or guidance for the assignment.
teacher.builder.form.scenarioPlaceholder: Describe the speaking scenario the tutor will run.
teacher.builder.languageMix.title: AI tutor language mix
teacher.builder.languageMix.hint: How much should the tutor stay in the target language vs. scaffold in English?
teacher.builder.languageMix.englishFirst: Novice-friendly - English leads, target language introduced alongside English meanings.
teacher.builder.languageMix.englishLedHi: English drives the conversation; target language carries key expressions and scenario moves.
teacher.builder.languageMix.balancedHint: Default. Alternates naturally between English and the target language.
teacher.builder.languageMix.targetLedHin: Mostly target language; brief English only when the learner stalls.
teacher.builder.languageMix.targetOnlyHi: Best for advanced classes - AI replies stay in the target language.

compliance.page.title: Lingual - Data & Compliance Overview
compliance.page.subtitle: Information for school administrators and coordinators evaluating Lingual for pilot use.
compliance.page.whatWeCollect.title: What data we collect
compliance.page.whatWeCollect.item1: Student text transcripts from practice sessions
compliance.page.whatWeCollect.item2: Voice transcripts when voice mode is enabled and consented
compliance.page.whatWeCollect.item3: Session metadata: duration, turn counts, modality used
compliance.page.whatWeCollect.item4: Learning events: target expression usage, feedback events, self-corrections
compliance.page.whatWeCollect.item5: Consent records and audit trails for compliance tracking
compliance.page.whatWeCollect.noBiometri: We do not collect biometric identifiers, voiceprints, or speaker recognition data.
compliance.page.howConsent.title: How consent works
compliance.page.howConsent.item1: Voice-enabled practice requires explicit student consent before any session can start.
compliance.page.howConsent.item2: Students self-consent on their own profile - teachers and admins can also grant or revoke consent on their behalf.
compliance.page.howConsent.item3: If voice consent is not granted, sessions are downgraded to text-only practice (typing with the AI tutor) where the assignment allows it.
compliance.page.howConsent.item4: Consent status is tracked per student per organization with a full audit trail.
compliance.page.howConsent.item5: Schools can issue secure-link guardian notices as supplementary parent communication.
compliance.page.thirdPartyAI.title: Third-party AI processing
compliance.page.thirdPartyAI.intro: Voice and text conversations are processed by OpenAI's GPT and Realtime APIs so the AI tutor can understand the student's response and generate the next turn in the target language. What leaves Lingual and what doesn't:
compliance.page.thirdPartyAI.sentDetail: student audio (voice mode), typed text, prior turns in the current session, and a system prompt that carries assignment context - scenario, target expressions, focus grammar, and learning locale.
compliance.page.thirdPartyAI.notSentDeta: student email, account identifiers, Firebase auth data, transcripts from past sessions, or any aggregated analytics.
compliance.page.thirdPartyAI.retention: OpenAI does not use data sent through its API to train its models. Under OpenAI's default API terms, payloads may be retained for up to 30 days for abuse monitoring and then deleted - that window is controlled by OpenAI, not Lingual. Transcripts that Lingual itself retains in Firestore are separate from OpenAI's processing and follow the retention defaults below.
compliance.page.whoCanAccess.title: Who can access what
compliance.page.whoCanAccess.studentsDet: can view their own profile, practice history, and compliance state.
compliance.page.whoCanAccess.teachersDet: can view data for students in their own classes only.
compliance.page.whoCanAccess.adminsDetai: can view organization-wide data, manage consent, and initiate deletion requests.
compliance.page.whoCanAccess.roleScoping: All access follows role-based scoping enforced at both the API and database rule level.
compliance.page.retention.title: Data retention defaults
compliance.page.retention.rawAudioDetail: 30 days (when stored under the standard school policy; can be set to zero via the no-raw-audio policy)
compliance.page.retention.configurable: Retention policies are configurable per organization. These are conservative defaults.
compliance.page.deletion.title: Deletion process
compliance.page.deletion.item1: School administrators can submit deletion requests for student, class, or organization scope.
compliance.page.deletion.item2: Requests go through an approval gate before execution.
compliance.page.deletion.item3: Execution is auditable with detailed summaries of what was deleted.
compliance.page.posture.title: Compliance posture
compliance.page.posture.para1: Lingual's school integration is designed with awareness of COPPA, FERPA, and state biometric privacy laws including Illinois BIPA. The architecture enforces consent-gated voice access, role-scoped data visibility, auditable consent trails, and configurable retention policies.
compliance.page.posture.para2: This is not a certification claim. Formal counsel review is part of our production readiness process. Schools should evaluate Lingual's controls against their own compliance requirements.
guardian.consent.unavailableDefault: This consent packet is no longer available.
guardian.consent.header.title: Lingual school voice consent
guardian.consent.decisionRecorded.title: Decision recorded
guardian.consent.decisionRecorded.desc: Guardian consent was marked as {status} on {date}.
guardian.consent.ack.label: I have reviewed this notice and I am authorized to respond for this student.
guardian.consent.afterDecision: The school can now review this updated consent status in the student compliance tools.
guardian.consent.footer.text: Need to contact the school directly instead? Return this notice to the teacher or school administrator managing the class.
guardian.consent.invalidToken: This guardian consent link is invalid.
guardian.consent.loadError: Failed to load guardian consent notice.
